def positive_condition_tree_nests_past_two_business_decision_levels():
    rule_id = "condition_tree_nests_past_two_business_decision_levels"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag functions with deeply nested business condition trees that would be clearer as smaller helpers or dispatch tables."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
